date.description: Requested appointment date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use this when the caller asks for availability on a day but does not specify an exact time.

start_time.description: Requested appointment start time in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset, for example 2026-04-03T10:00:00+02:00. Use this when the caller gives an exact time.

duration_minutes.description: Appointment duration in minutes. Defaults to 30 if not provided.
